mapper.select:
/* RAG 지식원천 문서 목록 조회 repository.selectDocRepositoryListCnt 선택 카테고리 + 그 하위(자손) 카테고리에 속한 문서 포함 */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM TB_DOC A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( WITH RECURSIVE CAT_SUBTREE AS ( SELECT CATEGORY_ID FROM TB_CONTENT_CAT WHERE CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} UNION ALL SELECT C.CATEGORY_ID FROM TB_CONTENT_CAT C INNER JOIN CAT_SUBTREE CS ON C.PARN_CAT_ID = CS.CATEGORY_ID ) SELECT 1 FROM CAT_SUBTREE CS WHERE CS.CATEGORY_ID = A.CATEGORY_ID )
AND ( A.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{findContent}, '%') OR A.DOC_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{findContent}, '%') )
ORDER BY A.DOC_ID DESC
